Releases.Name: Age of Legacy
Releases.Summary: Age of Legacy is an unforgiving roguelike RPG with intense turn-based 1v1 combat. Step into a world where survival is earned, not given. With no allies to assist you, every battle is a high-stakes duel, testing your build optimization and tactical foresight to the limit.
Releases.SimilarGames: Eador: Imperium · Sorcerer King · Torchlight III · Eternity: The Last Unicorn · Epic Seven · Tears of Avia

Undated.Name: Into The Unwell
Undated.Summary: Dive into The Unwell as one of several flawed and heavily medicated misfits in this delightfully despondent third-person roguelite game, playing alone or with up to two friends.
Undated.Developer: She Was Such A Good Horse
Undated.SimilarGames: Havocado · Apsulov: End of Gods · Hot Shot Burn · Torchlight III · Dude Simulator · Tanzia

Undated.Name: Canyons
Undated.Summary: Canyons is a third-person extraction shooter set in a procedurally generated post-apocalyptic world. Fight for your existence in 4 player co-op or solo, control massive Crawlers, build a settlement for survivors, and conquer this savage world!
Undated.SimilarGames: Torchlight III · Tanzia · Eternity: The Last Unicorn · Omensight · Wanderlust Adventures · Gene Rain

Undated.Name: ShatterRush
Undated.Summary: ShatterRush is a multiplayer FPS where fluid parkour movement and massive mechs meet fully destructible environments to create flow-state movement combat you’ve been waiting years for!

Undated.Name: Lazy River
Undated.Summary: A co-op adventure at the galaxy's most unregulated waterpark. Some guy peed in the pool, and the pee mixed with the space water and turned everybody into zombies… Except you and your friends. Build a raft, ride down the Lazy River, and escape before you run out of hot dogs!

Undated.Name: Greed Hunters
Undated.Summary: Earn rewards for your greed in this chaotic, multiplayer rogue-like game. Explore randomly generated dungeons with up to 8 players in a world where greed is the currency. To survive, you must outsmart and out-hoard your teammates.

Undated.Name: Monarch: The Tainted Kingdom
Undated.Summary: Monarch: TTK is an Action Monster Taming RPG where strategy dictates the flow of combat. Capture monsters, gather their loot to build custom skillsets, and master an engaging Timeline-based combat system. Uncover the secrets of the Archs and break through the corruption plaguing the Continent!

Undated.Name: Regions
Undated.Summary:
Regions is a agent-first city builder focused on infrastructure, procedural growth, and living city systems. Build roads, shape districts, manage transportation, and watch thousands of agents move through a region where every connection, event, and decision helps shape the city’s future.

Regions is a single-player city-building and regional management simulation focused on infrastructure, transportation, development, and the people who use them.
Undated.SimilarGames: Rise of Industry · Ancient Cities · Sol 0: Mars Colonization · Bronze Age · Supreme Ruler Ultimate · Another Brick in the Mall

Undated.Name: Idol Manager: Virtual Venture
Undated.Summary: The management simulation game Idol Manager depicted the good and bad sides of the idol industry... another entry in the series is here! This time, the focus is on virtual streamers! Manage a new streaming agency and raise your staff to become the best agency in the industry.
